catalog.description: Curated Neo Studio model source manifest for Image, Video, LLM, ControlNet/IPAdapter, VAE, text encoders, GGUF variants, and utility assets.
catalog.policy: The manifest defines model meaning, grouping, source intent, and install targets. User paths, tokens, installed scans, and download state belong in neo_data, not in the repo.

source.notes: Add the preferred SDXL base checkpoint source during catalog curation.

license.notes: User must confirm the model license from the source page.

notes: Phase 1 entry is a guide placeholder until curated download sources are added.

source.notes: Curated Civitai model/version IDs can be supplied by the manifest later or passed ad hoc through the Phase 5 Civitai discovery endpoint. Remote metadata/previews are session-only and are not persisted.

license.notes: Community model licenses vary by version.

notes: Phase 5 can fetch Civitai metadata, versions, preview URLs, and file rows when a model_id or version_id is supplied. No downloads or token storage are enabled.
